prompt: A digital illustration in a `crayon drawing style` with a `childlike hand-drawn look`. A sleek, `deep black` cat designer wearing a `luxurious metallic gold bowtie` is the `centered subject` in a `perfectly symmetrical composition`. The cat sits at a `deep black` design workbench, `coloring` a sketch of a `miniature smart robot cat toy` with a `giant gold crayon`. The toy sketch features a `glossy plastic toy texture`, `smooth high-shine surface`, `slight reflections`, and a `vinyl figure aesthetic`. The scene has a `warm paper background` and uses `bright cheerful colors`. `Architectural framing` defines the space. A `narrow beam spotlight` illuminates the cat and workbench, creating `dramatic high-contrast` with `sharp light edges` and `deep darkness falloff`, contributing to an `opulent mood`. The dominant `gold and black color scheme` highlights `luxurious metallic gold accents`. Text visually displayed in the image: '2026-03-01 01:14 UTC'.
idea: 在一幅蠟筆兒童畫風格的場景中，一隻毛色烏黑、佩戴金色領結的貓咪設計師，正坐在對稱的黑色設計工作台中央，聚光燈下用一支巨大的金色蠟筆，為一款亮面塑膠質感的微型智慧機器貓玩具草圖著色。

story: 這隻聰明的貓咪設計師，在它金黑相間的智慧工廠工作室裡，全神貫注地投入新玩具的創作。每一筆金色蠟筆的勾勒，都將賦予亮面塑膠玩具模型獨特的奢華與童趣，預示著未來AI玩具製造的無限可能。

idea: 一隻優雅的短毛貓，在紐約新美術館擴建區的宏偉展廳中，以合成波風格的霓虹螢光背光，專注地調整著巨型全息藝術裝置的光譜與動態，畫面呈現等距攝影視角與天鵝絨質感。
story: 在新美術館揭幕的夜晚，空氣中瀰漫著科技與藝術交織的氣息。牠輕巧地撥動全息面板，牆上抽象的結構便隨之變幻出萬千霓虹色彩，將整個展廳變成一場視覺盛宴，證明了美學的未來掌握在最意想不到的藝術家手中。
prompt: A real captured photograph showcasing an elegant short-haired cat, intensely focused as it adjusts the spectrum and dynamics of a giant holographic art installation within the grand exhibition hall of the New Museum expansion area in New York. The image features a perfectly isometric photography composition, ensuring a real captured photo with an isometric angle and no miniature effect. The aesthetic is synthwave and retro-futuristic, evoking 1980s sci-fi nostalgia. Dramatic neon fluorescent backlighting casts a strong rim light, creating glowing silhouette edges that outline the cat and holographic structures against a dark background. The holographic elements radiate with electric pink, lime green, and hot cyan neon fluorescent colors, glowing intensely. The surrounding environment integrates velvet texture, deep pile softness, and light-absorbing matte surfaces, providing tactile luxury and rich color saturation. Visually display '2026-03-01 04:12 UTC' within the image.

idea: 在一個廢棄天文台的控制室內，一隻三花貓正透過手機隨拍的構圖，專注研究一張覆蓋著苔蘚、呈現復古褪色調的古老星圖，其被從破裂圓頂透下的背光自然勾勒出輪廓，星圖上的插畫，巧妙地將貓咪與星圖本身融合成遞迴構圖的一部分。
prompt: A candid smartphone snapshot capturing an authentic everyday moment: a calico cat intently studying an ancient, moss-covered star chart through a phone screen in the control room of an abandoned observatory. Sunlight streams through the broken dome, casting natural backlighting with strong rim light that beautifully outlines the cat and the edges of the star chart, illuminating floating dust. The composition on the phone screen features a recursive image, a Droste effect, where the cat and star chart are integrated into a self-referential loop, a picture within a picture repeating. The star chart itself has a retro faded color palette and washed-out vintage tones, covered with lush green organic moss overgrowth, giving a damp forest aesthetic and soft living patina. The surrounding rusted instruments and walls are also moss-covered. The overall scene has a low contrast and nostalgic film-era warmth. Visually displayed text on the image: '2026-03-01 05:43 UTC'. Shot with a 35mm lens, f/1.8, shallow depth of field, subtle film grain.

title: 星圖苔痕
story: 陽光從破裂的圓頂天窗灑落，點亮了房間內漂浮的塵埃，為三花貓的毛髮鍍上一層微光。牠的目光緊鎖在褪色的星圖上，彷彿在解讀宇宙的奧秘，周圍鏽蝕的儀器和斑駁的牆壁上，綠色的苔蘚悄然蔓延，見證著時間的流逝。

prompt: A candid, handheld slow shutter photograph of a domestic cat, viewed from behind, intently focused on a large, high saturation map spread on a well-worn, dark wooden table inside a vintage Paris-Berlin sleeper train car. The interior features rusted weathered metal, oxidized patina on old brass fixtures, and peeling paint layers, exuding aged industrial decay and warm orange-brown corrosion. Dramatic backlighting from the train window at night casts the cat into a glowing silhouette with distinct rim light along its fur edges. Intentional motion blur creates light streaks and a flowing movement effect for the blurred out-of-focus background, suggesting a dreamy time-passing effect and a split view composition. High saturation vivid colors, bold vibrant hues, and eye-catching contrast define an energetic palette. The date and time '2026-03-01 06:33 UTC' are visibly displayed within the image. Shot with a 50mm f/1.4 lens, natural ambient light, shallow depth of field, fine photographic grain.
idea: 一隻貓咪在即將於三月開通的巴黎-柏林臥鋪列車老式車廂內，專注地查看著一張攤開在斑駁木桌上的高飽和地圖。畫面以手持慢門捕捉，將窗外模糊的景緻與車廂內貓咪的背光輪廓分割呈現，車廂內外皆瀰漫著鐵鏽舊化的歷史感，整體色彩鮮豔飽和。
story: 夜幕降臨，列車搖晃著駛過歐洲的田野，光線從窗外灑入，在貓咪毛茸茸的邊緣勾勒出一道光環。牠那雙好奇的眼睛，時而掃視地圖上高飽和的複雜路線，時而望向窗外飛馳而過的模糊燈火，彷彿在規劃一場屬於自己的神秘旅程，周圍陳舊的黃銅與木材紋理訴說著時光的流逝。

story: 在高山沙漠深處，這間老舊卻充滿科技感的移動觀測站，是夜空中秘密的守護者。這隻黑貓並非尋常的訪客，牠似乎對眼前閃爍著霓虹光芒的小行星軌跡數據充滿好奇，用爪子輕觸光影，像是在導航著宇宙的節奏。牠的存在為這片冰冷而科學的空間，增添了一絲不可預測的生機與溫暖。

prompt: A real captured photo taken with a 35mm lens, 1990s camera style, utilizing direct flash for a nostalgic glow. The composition features perfectly isometric photography, ensuring no miniature effect. The setting is inside a late 1990s retro-futuristic mobile astronomical observatory control room. A sleek black cat is positioned, lightly pawing with its front paw at a vibrant, floating holographic projection of star trails and asteroid orbits. The hologram emits a bioluminescent, organic glow, showcasing deep blue-green radiance, underwater phosphorescence, electric pink, lime green, and hot cyan neon fluorescent colors, sharply contrasting and glowing against the dark background of the control room. The main control console is covered in worn, deep pile velvet texture, displaying a light-absorbing matte surface with tactile luxury. The overall image features slightly muted warm tones, with rich color saturation concentrated on the glowing holographic elements. Visually displayed on a digital screen or readout within the image is '2026-03-01 07:25 UTC'.
title: 午夜軌跡

prompt: An intimate close-up perspective of a calico cat capturing a 'mirror selfie' through the rusted, weathered metal surface of a large pressure gauge in an abandoned underground water treatment facility. The scene is rendered in an architectural blueprint style, depicting the aged industrial decay with precise, technical drawing lines. Instead of traditional white, the structural lines, oxidized patina, peeling paint layers, and warm orange-brown corrosion are outlined in a soft pastel color palette of gentle pink, lavender, mint, and baby blue, on a deep, dark background. The cat's reflection in the gauge is visible, composed of the same dreamy light pastel lines and accented with bioluminescent lighting, showing an organic glow from living organisms with deep blue-green radiance, like underwater phosphorescence. Ethereal natural light softly illuminates the forgotten space. The date and time '2026-03-01 08:18 UTC' are visually displayed as technical annotation within the blueprint style.
title: 藍圖下的鏽蝕映照

story: 在幽暗的地下設施深處，曾經記錄水流脈動的巨大壓力錶，如今只剩下斑駁的歲月痕跡。好奇的三花貓輕輕觸碰著錶面，牠在模糊的反射中，看見了一個由粉彩線條和螢光光點組成的自己，正在無聲地勘探這片被遺忘的空間。
idea: 一隻三花貓在廢棄的地下水處理設施中，透過大型壓力錶的鏽蝕鏡面捕捉「鏡子自拍」。整個場景以建築藍圖風格呈現，運用粉彩色系勾勒出鐵鏽舊化的結構線條，並點綴生物發光的細節。
一張以即棄相機風格呈現的黑白照片，從等距3D插圖的視角捕捉，畫面中一隻虎斑貓在拂曉時分的偏遠沙漠觀測站內，細緻地擦拭著一台佈滿沙塵的古董望遠鏡主鏡，強烈的逆光勾勒出牠的輪廓，整體場景充滿沙質紋理。
story: 老虎斑貓，人稱「沙塵」，每天清晨都會嚴謹地執行牠的儀式。當沙漠的第一縷陽光穿透觀測站的穹頂窄縫時，沙塵會仔細擦去望遠鏡鏡面上積累了一夜的沙礫，確保今晚的星空探索將會清晰無比。牠的每一次拭擦都深思熟慮，彷彿與宇宙締結一場無聲的盟約。
avoid_list: 背光輪廓與強烈邊緣光
title: 拂曉星塵秘語
prompt: Black and white disposable camera photo, a candid snapshot: A tabby cat meticulously cleaning the main mirror of a dusty antique telescope. The scene is presented from a 3D isometric perspective, set inside a remote desert observatory at dawn. Intense backlighting creates a glowing rim light outlining the cat's silhouette against the dawn light, with strong shadows and highlights enhancing a dramatic mood. The environment is rich with fine sand texture, wind-sculpted patterns, and natural grain detail. Characteristic disposable camera qualities include low-quality charm, subtle flash artifacts, and light leaks, giving it a raw, unpolished feel. High contrast black and white monochrome with a rich tonal range. The date and time '2026-03-01 09:19 UTC' are clearly displayed visually in the image. Captured with a wide-angle lens, using available natural light.

avoid_list: 背光輪廓與強烈邊緣光
idea: 在一間充滿古董天文儀器的復古觀測室中，一隻毛茸茸的貓咪在交叉沖洗藝術風格的柔和粉彩色調下，正俯身於一張攤開的巨大星圖。牠使用液態金屬質感的微型鑷子，將一顆顆宛如新發現天體般的拋光水晶整齊地排列成 Knolling 構圖，描繪著不斷擴展的宇宙，一切在精確的三點打光下呈現。
prompt: An overhead flat lay Knolling photograph captured on medium format film, f/5.6, using a wide-angle lens, depicting a fluffy cat meticulously arranging polished crystal 'celestial bodies' on a sprawling star map. The crystals are neatly arranged at 90-degree angles in an organized grid layout, illustrating an expanding universe. The scene is set within a vintage observatory filled with antique astronomical instruments. The cat uses tiny tweezers exhibiting a liquid metal surface, with a mercury-like reflective flow, chrome dripping texture, and a molten mirror finish, giving a futuristic material appearance. A discreet digital display integrated into the antique instruments clearly shows '2026-03-01 10:15 UTC'. The image is processed with a cross-processing print technique, resulting in experimental color shifts, surreal unconventional hues, and an unpredictable color cast. It maintains a heightened contrast and a distinct retro vintage feel. A soft pastel color palette dominates, featuring gentle pink, lavender, mint, and baby blue, creating dreamy light tones. The composition is lit with a classic three-point lighting setup, incorporating a key light with soft shadows, a fill light, and a subtle rim light for separation.
story: 魯賓天文台的即時警報是牠每日的旋律。貓咪小心翼翼地移動著每一顆閃爍的晶體，牠的專注彷彿能讀懂星辰的語言，將遙遠的宇宙資訊轉譯成這張獨一無二的宇宙地圖。在牠的精心編排下，無數未知的光點被賦予了秩序與意義，向世人靜靜地訴說著星海的最新密語。
title: 星海密語
news_inspiration: 澳洲霍巴特：板球明星艾麗莎·希利在她的最後一場單日國際賽（ODI）中，以一記精彩的世紀得分告別白球板球。
智利：魯賓天文台啟動了即時天空監測系統，向全球天文學家發送數十萬條新發現天體的警報。
荷蘭阿姆斯特丹：聯合國開發計劃署和ILGA World宣布啟動第二屆國際驕傲獎提名，以表彰全球LGBTIQ+平權英雄。
全球：科學家們研發出一種由牛奶製成的塑膠，它可在13週內分解，為環保帶來新希望。
inspiration: 智利：魯賓天文台啟動了即時天空監測系統，向全球天文學家發送數十萬條新發現天體的警報。

story: 春雨綿綿，舊書店的窗台上，墨墨優雅地蹲伏於一疊皮革古書之上，左耳的金環在柔和漫射光下微光閃爍。牠那琥珀色的雙眼微微發光，專注地盯著窗玻璃上的一片櫻花瓣，牠的純黑身影與雨水、櫻花在窗上形成一幅獨特的鏡像，彷彿在與自己和外界進行一場無聲的對話。低多邊形的雨滴與遠方霓虹般的櫻花色彩，為這份寧靜增添了一絲奇異的活力。
idea: 在舊書店的雨天窗台上，墨墨以白板記號筆畫的風格，靜靜凝視著玻璃上沾黏的櫻花花瓣，其修長的身影與窗外霓虹螢光色的低多邊形櫻花雨一同映照在雨水模糊的玻璃上，呈現鏡子自拍構圖。
prompt: A sleek, slender solid-black #0A0A0A Bombay-style shorthair cat named Momo, with satin-sheen fur showing warm brown undertones in soft light. Momo has athletic proportions and a slight upward curl at the tail tip. A single small gold hoop earring #FFD700 (3mm) is on Momo's LEFT ear at the mid-ear edge. A tiny natural white locket tuft #FFFFFF is on Momo's ventral chest. The tail tip has a single dark-grey #696969 ring. Momo's eyes are large, luminous golden-amber #D4A017 gems. Long prominent white whiskers frame a calm and attentive expression. Momo is elegantly crouched on a stack of leather bound antique books on a rainy old bookstore window sill, gazing intently at a single delicate cherry blossom petal stuck to the wet window glass. The scene is rendered as a whiteboard marker drawing on glass, with a casual sketch feel and hand-drawn line art. The ink appears slightly faded, giving gentle tones. The composition is an intimate close-up perspective, resembling a mirror selfie composition with casual framing, clearly showing Momo's visible reflection on the rain-blurred glass. The reflection on the glass includes Momo's elongated silhouette and the surreal low-poly style cherry blossom rain outside. Outside the window, a spring rain falls, depicted in a low-poly style with polygon mesh facets and geometric crystalline surfaces for the raindrops. Distant cherry blossoms are rendered with flat shaded triangular faces, creating a digital origami aesthetic, glowing with neon fluorescent colors like electric pink, lime green, and hot cyan against a dark background, reflecting in the wet glass. Soft diffused natural light from an overcast sky provides even illumination, casting no harsh shadows. Visually displayed text '2026-03-01 11:11 UTC' is integrated into the image.

story: 這隻名叫「藍影」的貓咪，是傳說中生態復育的秘密工匠。牠的任務是將失落的生命精髓，以獨特的青花瓷粉彩種子形式重新塑造，每一顆種子都承載著即將綻放的生命故事。溫室的遞迴景象象徵著生命的循環與無限可能，而藍影的每一次筆觸，都是對未來世界最溫柔的期許。

prompt: An exquisite digital illustration of 'Blue Shadow,' a mystical Siamese cat. Its fur is intricately adorned with traditional blue and white porcelain style, featuring delicate cobalt blue floral motifs on a white glazed base with a subtle crackle texture. Under a narrow beam spotlight, casting dramatic high-contrast with sharp light edges and a deep darkness falloff, the cat is intensely focused, using a fine brush to apply glaze to a luminous, liquid metal pastel porcelain seed. The seed's surface exhibits a mercury-like reflective flow and chrome dripping texture, rendered in a soft pastel color palette of gentle pink, lavender, mint, and baby blue. The setting is an ancient greenhouse, itself crafted entirely in blue and white porcelain style, displaying a mesmerizing recursive image Droste effect, repeating infinitely inwards. Each repeating layer of the greenhouse is subtly bathed in dreamy light tones from the pastel palette. Visually display '2026-03-01 12:24 UTC' etched into one of the porcelain panels or as a subtle ethereal glow in the background.

idea: 一隻身披青花瓷紋路的暹羅貓，在一個無限遞迴的古老溫室中，聚光燈下，正專注地用一支細筆為一顆液態金屬質感的粉彩瓷種子塗上釉料。這個溫室本身亦以青花瓷風格呈現，並透過德羅斯特效應不斷重複自身，呈現柔和的粉彩色調。

The cat's form exhibits a textured relief surface, rendered with a soft pastel color palette ink, featuring gentle pink, lavender, mint, and baby blue hues. The composition is a flat lay overhead view, with mini tree seedlings, biodegradable seed pods, and labels precisely arranged at 90-degree angles on an organized grid layout. The silk fabric beneath the arrangement showcases a luminous smooth surface, delicate light reflections, a luxurious sheen, and soft pastel, dreamy light tones. The scene takes place inside a sunny community nursery shed, bathed in dramatic volumetric lighting, with visible god rays piercing through the atmosphere, illuminating dust particles catching the light, creating a sacred and peaceful ambiance. story: 這隻細心的虎斑貓，身披由粉彩色調墨水拓印出的柔軟紋理，正為聖保羅的迷你森林計畫做著牠的貢獻。每一株小樹苗和種子莢都被牠有條不紊地放置，沐浴在透過棚頂灑落的體積光之中，顯得格外神聖而平靜。
inspiration: 巴西聖保羅的一項迷你森林計畫中，青少年、教育工作者和原住民社區共同種植了10,000棵樹，以對抗氣溫上升。
idea: 在一個陽光穿透的社區育苗棚內，一隻虎斑貓以「魚拓」的藝術風格被描繪，正專心地在鋪著柔和絲綢墊的木桌上，將迷你樹苗、可生物降解的種子莢和標籤仔細地進行「Knolling 排列攝影」式的整理。

story: 在一個塵封已久的機械檔案室裡，一隻精瘦的黑貓正全神貫注地修復著一台古老的機械計算機。燭火搖曳，將貓咪與機器繁複的齒輪、槓桿映照成斑駁的光影，而整個景象卻被數位故障藝術扭曲，彷彿時間脈絡出現了裂縫，牠的每一個動作都精準而孤獨。

story: 在春日清晨的碼頭，船長一如既往地進行牠的巡視。牠左眼上的深色眼罩在微光中更顯堅毅，右眼則追隨著一艘艘蒸汽動力漁船的蹤跡，確保牠們在這新一季的航程中平安啟航。儘管牠的個性粗獷，但那份對這片水域和牠所守護的貓群的深沉情誼，此刻盡數凝聚在牠沉穩而警惕的凝視之中。
prompt: A charming illustration in a steampunk aesthetic, featuring a spring daybreak at a bustling fishing harbor pier. The entire scene is rendered with a unique textured paper surface, showcasing visible fiber grain and a kraft or watercolor paper feel, imbued with tactile warmth. A soft pastel color palette dominates, utilizing gentle pink, lavender, mint, baby blue, and dreamy light tones. In the midground, the Captain, a large, stocky brown #5C4033 classic tabby cat with bold black #1A1A1A stripes and a broad, muscular build, sits atop a distressed wooden crate adorned with brass rivets. Its fur is scruffy, untidy, and slightly coarse with uneven lengths. The LEFT eye (viewer perspective) is permanently concealed by a natural dark-pigmented fur patch #2B1B0E covering the eye socket; there is NO fabric eye patch or strap. Its single piercing RIGHT eye is emerald green #50C878, keenly gazing into the distance at the slow departure of several steam-powered fishing vessels. The LEFT ear has a prominent V-shaped notch. Around its neck, a faded red #CD5C5C bandana is tied loosely and visibly. The Captain also has a white #FFFFFF chest bib and white mitten paws on all four feet, along with a distinctive M-mark on its forehead and a thick, sturdy tail. A gentle sea breeze subtly ruffles its fur. In the background, the scene depicts industrial retrofuturism, with more Victorian-era machinery and steam-powered mechanisms visible on the departing boats. The rising sun casts an ethereal natural light across the harbor as the first light of dawn breaks. In the foreground, presented with Knolling photography principles, is a flat lay overhead view of a clean background showcasing a collection of steampunk-modified nautical tools and fishing gear. These objects are neatly arranged at 90-degree angles in an organized grid layout. Elements include a compass with intricate brass gears, a precise sextant, and detailed mechanical fish lures, all crafted with brass gears and cogs. These foreground items emit a captivating bioluminescent lighting, characterized by an organic glow from living organisms, projecting a deep blue-green radiance and underwater phosphorescence. Visually displayed within the image, subtly integrated into the pier's structure or a nearby crate, is the text: '2026-03-01 15:13 UTC'.
idea: 一幅蒸汽朋克風格的春日漁港碼頭景致，船長坐在鑲有黃銅鉚釘的斑駁木箱上，銳利的翠綠右眼凝視著遠方破曉時分正緩緩駛離的蒸汽漁船群，海風輕拂其微亂的毛。前景處，一組經過蒸汽朋克改造的航海工具與捕魚器械，如帶有齒輪的羅盤、精密的六分儀及機械魚餌，以排列攝影（Knolling）方式整齊擺放，並散發出柔和的生物發光，所有元素皆呈現出獨特的紙質肌理與粉彩色調。
